rationale: Planning build consumes the validated documentation build, creates executable TASK-100, and maps all GC requirements to task acceptance, candidate files, and test strategy. TASK-100 has a direct outcome and own acceptance evidence; it is not a container task. Audit warnings are expected candidate-path/generated-view warnings before implementation and publication.

issues.summary: Task audit reports missing candidate files src/application/gc.ts and src/application/tools/gc.ts; expected because implementation has not created them yet.
Changed audit reports generated graph/task views changed; expected after roadmap/build refresh and must be committed/regenerated before publication.
Alignment audit reports graph health warnings from current unimplemented planning state; expected until implementation closes TASK-100.

audit_reports: CodeWiki audit: warning; alignment warning graph-health; task warning missing candidate paths; stale-reference pass; changed warning generated-file-changed

isolation_requirement.reason: Fresh validation is preferred but not required for this profile.

audit_requirement.reason: Gateway profiles require deterministic audit evidence for their build or boundary context.
